_story: PD-L1 TPS 45% falls between 1st-line and 2nd-line thresholds. AI cannot determine line of therapy — routes to nurse with full context pre-loaded.

labs.note: AMBIGUOUS — 1st-line requires TPS ≥50%; 2nd-line requires TPS ≥1%. Patient's line of therapy is unclear from documentation.

escalation_reason.detail: PD-L1 TPS 45% falls between 1st-line threshold (≥50%) and 2nd-line threshold (≥1%). Oncology note does not explicitly state whether prior platinum-based chemotherapy was attempted. Clinical judgment required to determine applicable guideline.
escalation_reason.nurse_question: Has this patient received prior platinum-based chemotherapy? If yes → 2nd-line guideline applies (TPS ≥1% = APPROVE). If no → 1st-line guideline applies (TPS 45% < 50% = DENY).
